applied_optimizations.name: torch.compile
applied_optimizations.description: Applied torch.compile(mode='default') to forward method for automatic operator fusion. Achieved 2.5x speedup from 7.38ms to 2.95ms.

attempted_but_failed.name: Manual Triton LayerNorm+GELU fusion kernel
attempted_but_failed.reason: Correctness issues - output mismatch despite correct indexing logic verified in isolation. The kernel loads/stores correctly in simple tests but produces different results when integrated with the full model pipeline.
attempted_but_failed.error: Output mismatch with ~0.41-0.42 avg difference, ~5.5-5.9 max difference

notes: Manual Triton kernels proved difficult to get correct for this specific tensor layout
